mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_template (template_name, template_code, description, schema_json, version, status, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{templateCode}, #{description}, #{schemaJson}, #{version}, #{status}, #{tenantId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_name, template_code, description, schema_json, version, status, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT id, template_name, template_code, description, schema_json, version, status, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, template_name, template_code, description, schema_json, version, status, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT id, template_name, template_code, description, schema_json, version, status, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
